title: Magic for Dummies 2
description: Simplified magic for everyone! Now on Modrinth!
body:
About

Magic for Dummies was an old mod I made that I really liked the concept of.

Magic mods are cool, but they can be very complicated, so I made an easy to understand alternative.

Magic for Dummies 2 adds eight new magic wands. They can all be crafted inside the magic table with a stick and a magic tome.

These magic tomes can be obtained by exploring the new magician's dungeons. You'll always find a magic table there.

 

 Screenshots

 

Crafting

Magic wands are crafted using a stick and a magic tome. Place a stick in the first slot of the magic table and a tome in the second.

Magic tables are found in magician's dungeons, but they can als be crafted in the same way as an enchanting table,

 but using emeralds instead of diamonds and without a book.

 

Enchantments

  • Darting | Decreases the cooldown of wands (5t*level) (max 3)
  • Mastery | Increase effectiveness of wands (effects differ per wand) (max 3)

 

Localisation

  • English (United States) 100%
  • Spanish (Spain) 97%
  • Dutch (Netherlands) 97%

 

If you have any feedback on the localisation, let me know!

 

FAQ

Can I use this in a modpack? | Yes

Can I redistribute this mod (on another website)? | Yes, but be sure to follow the AFL 3.0 Licence.

Fabric? | Sadly no, due to features that need to be cut.

Mcreator? | I didn't have to cut anything due to the limitations of Mcreator

  

Credits

https://itch.io/profile/pixelcreations

https://mcreator.net/about

  

Original Mod
